title: cerastium glabratum subsp. glabratum
intro: Cerastium glabratum subsp. glabratum, also known as the smooth mouse-ear chickweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing swelling, and promoting wound healing. Cerastium glabratum subsp. glabratum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical or internal use.
